description_long: This donut features a golden-brown, slightly domed base topped with a thick layer of glossy chocolate glaze. The chocolate coating is generously sprinkled with small, round, pink and white sprinkles, adding a festive touch. At the center of the donut sits a swirl of white whipped cream, piped in a spiral pattern and crowned with a bright red maraschino cherry and a green stem. The donut is presented on a round, marble-patterned plate with subtle gray veining. The overall appearance is indulgent and visually appealing, with contrasting textures and colors. The donut looks fresh and inviting, perfect for a dessert display or café setting.
description: A chocolate-glazed donut with pink and white sprinkles, topped with whipped cream and a cherry, served on a marble-patterned plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the donut's chocolate glaze, pink and white sprinkles, and the whipped cream swirl topped with a cherry, all clearly visible on a marble-patterned plate.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the thickness of the chocolate glaze and the height of the whipped cream, with the cherry and its stem more prominent.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the donut's round shape, the even distribution of sprinkles, and the central placement of the whipped cream and cherry.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the donut, with the chocolate glaze and sprinkles wrapping around, and the cherry and whipped cream still visible from above.
attribute_icing_type: Chocolate glaze with a glossy finish, topped with a piped swirl of white whipped cream.
attribute_topping_type: Pink and white round sprinkles, maraschino cherry with stem.
attribute_packaging_style: None; the donut is presented unwrapped on a ceramic plate.
attribute_placement_location: On a round, marble-patterned ceramic plate.
